overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in a red jacket walking through an urban park promenade at night. The scene features ornate Victorian-style street lamps, stone balustrades, and autumn foliage with a modern city skyline backdrop.

scene_state.functional_zone: straight promenade walkway with stone balustrade

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the straight path toward the ornate lamp post

entered.detail: tall Victorian-style street lamp with multiple glowing globes at the top
decorative stone railing with urn-shaped balusters running along the right side
raised stone wall with built-in planters containing shrubs
trees with red and orange autumn foliage
illuminated modern skyscrapers visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a straight paved promenade at night, approaching a large ornate street lamp. Stone balustrades line the right side while planter walls with autumn trees are on the left, with the city skyline visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with benches and planters

events.description: passing the ornate lamp post and entering the open plaza area
character begins turning left to follow the curved plaza path

agents.ego_description: navigating around the lamp post and curving left through the plaza

notable_agents.action: distant pedestrian walking across the plaza in the background

entered.detail: black metal park benches arranged along the left side
metal trash receptacle near the balustrade

segments.scene_description: The character passes the ornate lamp post and enters a more open plaza area with scattered benches and planters. The path curves left, and a distant pedestrian is visible walking in the background near the city buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved plaza walkway with seating areas

events.description: continuing along the curved path, passing by benches and planters

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved pathway passing benches and large planter boxes

entered.detail: large rectangular planters with lush vegetation

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the curved plaza, passing black metal benches and large planter boxes. The stone balustrade remains on the right while the path opens up to show more of the urban park landscape.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved path with the illuminated city skyline visible ahead

entered.detail: bridge structure visible in the far distance with lights

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the final curved section of the promenade, with the stone balustrade on the right and the illuminated city skyline prominently visible ahead. The path continues toward the distant urban landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a nighttime urban promenade that transitions from a narrow paved path into an expansive open plaza. It begins with the character walking past autumn trees and stone balustrades toward a large, ornate street lamp. As the character passes the lamp, the environment opens into a wider plaza area where the path curves left, revealing scattered benches and a distant pedestrian near the city buildings. The scene then expands further through the curved plaza, passing black metal benches and large planter boxes while the stone balustrade continues to line the right side. Finally, the camera follows the character along the last bend of the promenade as the illuminated city skyline becomes prominently visible ahead.
